name: get_profile
description: Get your Threads profile information (user ID, username). Use this to verify your account or retrieve your user ID. Required before making posts to ensure your access token is valid.

name: create_post
description: Publish a text post to Threads, optionally with images. Use this to create new posts, including single-image posts or carousels (up to 10 images). For local image files, the script automatically uploads them to a temporary hosting service (Catbox). For listing existing posts, use list_posts instead.

image.description: Image URL or local file path (max 10 images for carousel)

name: list_posts
description: List your recent posts from Threads. Use this to view your post history with timestamps, text content, and permalinks. For creating new posts, use create_post instead.
